stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 4444, what is the correct statement regarding the provisions for the separation of controlled traffic?

options.a: Clearances shall only be given for horizontal separation during the en-route phase.
options.b: Vertical or horizontal separation shall be provided between VFR flights in Class C, D and E airspaces.
options.c: Smaller separations than the specified minima should only be applied whenever exceptional circumstances occur and must be done with due regard to all the relevant factors.
options.d: No clearance shall be given to execute any manoeuvre that would reduce the spacing between two aircraft to less than the separation minimum applicable in the circumstances.
